name: CO₂ Factor (tCO₂ per kWh)
helpText: Multiply raw energy (kWh) by this to get tCO₂ avoided. Default 0.0007 = Sri Lanka grid (0.7 kgCO₂/kWh). Use 0.000233 for EU avg, 0.000386 for US avg, 0.000436 for IEA world avg.

name: Home Equivalent Divider (kWh/home/year)
helpText: Annual kWh consumed by one average household. Divide lifetime energy by this to get equivalent homes powered. Default 1330 = Sri Lanka avg household. Use 10500 for US avg, 3100 for EU avg, 4500 for UK avg.

name: Input Value Divider
helpText: Divide raw telemetry value by this number before calculations.

name: Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for CO₂ and homes values.

name: Years Running (Static Override)
helpText: Fixed years value. Leave empty to auto-calculate from commissioning date.

name: Commissioning Date (YYYY-MM-DD)
helpText: Used to calculate years if static override is empty.

name: Tooltip Content
helpText: Hover tooltip text. Leave empty to hide.
default: Lifetime environmental impact metrics derived from total energy generation.

name: Custom Accent Color (Optional)
helpText: Override theme accent color, e.g. #FF6B35. Leave empty for default green.
